free_text: Radiochemical studies of the interaction of copper with
Pure copper foils of thickness 0.001-in. were used as
targets. The target stack consisted of six or seven
foils of copper and one foil of polythene having a
SD: REACTION code in Subent 17 corrected.
*By compiler*.A direct comparison of the corrected
counting rate of the Cu-61 component in the copper
fraction with the corrected C-11 counting rate in
polythene, assuming a C-11 cross-section of 28.4 mb,
(See Rel-Ref) gives an absolute cross-section for the
production of Cu-61 from natural copper.
SD: SF4=Cl-34 -> Cl-34m in REACTION code
